entities.name: Honorius
entities.raw_quote: we selected one named Honorius, son of Euclid, master of Thebes

entities.name: Hocrohel
entities.raw_quote: And he, with the consulting angel Hocrohel, named seven books of the magic art

entities.name: Samaym
entities.raw_quote: the thrones or seats (sedes) of the supernatural beings, such as the seat of Samaym

entities.name: Primachia
entities.raw_quote: the seats of Primachia and Apologia

entities.name: Apologia
entities.raw_quote: the seats of Primachia and Apologia

entities.name: Seal of God
entities.raw_quote: Since the Seal of God (also called the Seal of Solomon) is needed in the other rituals

entities.name: Satan
entities.raw_quote: Abrenuncio Sathane et omnibus pompis eius

entities.name: God
entities.raw_quote: the hundred sacred names of God are included in this book

entities.name: ritual of calling forth the spirits
entities.raw_quote: The core ritual takes seventy-two days in the London Honorius, but forty days in SSM.

entities.name: purification
entities.raw_quote: A twenty-day purification comes next, involving attending mass, and reciting certain prayers

entities.name: fasting and prayer
entities.raw_quote: This is followed by twelve days of fasting and prayer

entities.name: four-part ritual
entities.raw_quote: followed by a four-part ritual: the 'invocation,' the 'seal and binding,' the 'conjuration,' and the 'placation.'

entities.name: wand/sword/whistle/magic circle
entities.raw_quote: hazel wand, seals of spirits, incense offerings, magic circles, swords, and whistle.

entities.name: bed surrounded by ashes
entities.raw_quote: you prepare a bed surrounded by ashes with divine names written therein. This is the stage for critical sleep visions.

summary: This chunk details the ritual procedures, tools, and historical context of the Liber Juratus Honorii. It describes specific stages of magic operations (purification, fasting, sleep visions), mentions key entities like Honorius and the angel Hocrohel, and outlines the components of Solomonic magic such as seals, wands, and sacred names.
key_passages: The core ritual takes seventy-two days in the London Honorius, but forty days in SSM.
And he, with the consulting angel Hocrohel, named seven books of the magic art
the hundred sacred names of God are included in this book
you prepare a bed surrounded by ashes with divine names written therein. This is the stage for critical sleep visions.
The process for calling the spirits commences similarly, followed by a four-part ritual: the 'invocation,' the 'seal and binding,' the 'conjuration,' and the 'placation.'
